subcodes.first_line: O My handmaid! Concern not thyself with that which is outwardly apparent; fix thy gaze, rather, upon that which lieth within. Look thou upon the beauty of God’s loved ones
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من از ظاهر بگذر و بباطن ناظر باش جمال احبای الهی را بچشم حق مشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @outward and inward meanings
